Source: Vertex AI Release Notes
URL: https://cloud.google.com/vertex-ai/docs/release-notes
Fetched: 2026-03-19

# Vertex AI Release Notes (2026)

## March 2026
- Mar 16: Vertex Explainable AI deprecated
- Mar 12: Gen AI evaluation service now supports partner models (Anthropic, Llama)
- Mar 5: Vector Search 2.0 GA — collections unifying data/vectors, auto-embeddings, hybrid search, Private Service Connect and VPC Service Controls
- Mar 3: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite public preview (cost-efficient, low-latency)
- Mar 3: Video generation preview endpoints deprecated (migration deadline Apr 2)

## February 2026
- Feb 23: Claude 3 Haiku deprecated (shutdown Aug 23, 2026)
- Image generation endpoint transitions with migration deadlines

## Key Highlights
- Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite for cost-efficient applications
- Vector Search 2.0 with hybrid search capabilities
- Partner model evaluation support
- Ongoing model deprecation management
